items.title: Police officers among seven arrested over deadly Haiti stampede
items.dek: An investigation is under way into what led to the deaths of 25 people at Laferrière Citadel on Saturday.
items.body: An investigation is under way into what led to the deaths of 25 people at Laferrière Citadel on Saturday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Korea jails 90-year-old woman for laundering son's drug money
items.dek: The woman has been sentenced to a year in jail for laundering money for her son who is imprisoned in Cambodia.
items.body: The woman has been sentenced to a year in jail for laundering money for her son who is imprisoned in Cambodia.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Greek police using masked migrants to forcibly push other migrants back across border
items.dek: Mercenaries recruited since at least 2020 for illegal migrant ‘pushbacks’ in Greece, BBC told
